situation: Full audit cycle triggered (cycle-complete from audit-044). All workspace projects audited ≥1×. personal-assistant had 9 unaudited modules remaining after audits 021/027/042/044.
action: Deep audit via 2 sonnet sub-agents covering all 9 remaining modules. Produced 19 findings (3H/10M/5L/1I). Wrote audit report audit-2026-07-08-045.md. Updated audit-cycle-state with 8 pending route-fixes + 6 structural debts + 9 direction-shifts deferred.
outcome_evidence: audit-2026-07-08-045.md written (19 findings); audit-cycle-state.json updated (status=fix-in-progress, pending_count=8, 22 derived_fixes entries)
next_suggestion: Dispatch PA-B2-H-001 (cli.py default 0.0.0.0 → 127.0.0.1) as first route-fix — highest severity, smallest change
Then PA-B2-H-003+M-001 (reminders recurring ID + race) as combined fix
After all 8 route-fixes merged/rejected → cycle-complete triggers next full audit

audit_findings.finding: Default bind 0.0.0.0 exposes all endpoints to network when PA_API_TOKEN unset
audit_findings.remediation: Change default to 127.0.0.1; add startup warning when host!=loopback AND token unset

audit_findings.finding: Non-atomic cross-DB write: SQLite commits then DuckDB analytics fails → permanent data loss
audit_findings.remediation: Track analytics completion separately; allow re-analytics on failure

audit_findings.finding: Recurring reminder ID collision: -next suffix grows unboundedly + old entries never cleaned
Race: notify() before mark_reminder_fired() → duplicate notification on crash
audit_findings.remediation: Mark fired before notifying; add threading lock

audit_findings.finding: _cn_to_int silently returns 0 for malformed input; mixed KeyError/zero fallback
audit_findings.remediation: Raise ValueError or return None; validate split parts in CN dict

audit_findings.finding: Ambiguous date resolution: past-event narration rolled to next year
No connection pooling; SCHEMA re-executed per connect; no WAL mode
audit_findings.remediation: Enable WAL; use connection pool; run schema once at startup

audit_findings.finding: Non-atomic profile update: save_persona_version + kv_set separate transactions
audit_findings.remediation: Wrap both writes in single transaction

audit_findings.finding: LLM-fallback time range used without ISO validation
audit_findings.remediation: Validate ISO format before SQL query; fall through to keyword search on failure

audit_findings.finding: DuckDB connection leak on exception: no try/finally
scan_inbox retries failed audio ASR every poll indefinitely
ASR segment retrieval by filename collision
_share_token anti-hallucination trivially bypassed by common CJK substrings
audit_findings.remediation: Raise min token length or use LCS ratio
Require coverage ratio ≥30% or TF-based overlap

audit_findings.finding: Fuzzy title matching can silently merge unrelated pages
audit_findings.remediation: Prefer exact match; use edit-distance for fuzzy

audit_findings.finding: LLM dict spread (**p) overwrites page fields non-atomically
User message injected verbatim without boundary markers
audit_findings.remediation: Structured message formatting with role delimiters

audit_findings.finding: Notify log append non-atomic without locking

audit_findings.remediation: Anchor regex or add post-match validation
